CapMultiSelect.note: Used for Program name, Status, Category, Last updated, Updated by filter fields

CapDateRangePicker.note: Used for Duration filter field (122:4358). Not in standard cap-ui-library registry; treat as CapInput-based date range or custom component. ASSUMED from Figma node name.

CapButton.note: Apply (122:4395) and Clear all filters (122:4396) footer buttons

CapLabel.note: Section labels: Program name, Status, Category, Duration, Last updated, Updated by
